headline: Micron sinks after whipsaw week
detail: Chip stocks are under active selling pressure as Micron closes a brutal week. This directly pressures AVGO and your SMH position — weak chip sentiment is contagious across the sector. Watch whether SMH holds above its $540 stop.

headline: Inflation tops 4%, Fed pressure eases
detail: Sticky inflation above 4% pushes rate cuts further out, which compresses valuations on high-multiple tech names like PLTR and CRWD. Trump easing pressure on Fed Chair Warsh removes a short-term volatility catalyst but doesn't fix the underlying rate problem for your book.

headline: Grantham: Most expensive U.S. market in history
detail: A credible long-term bear calling peak valuations matters when you're leveraged in the most expensive sector of an expensive market. It won't crash the tape today, but it's a reason to keep stops tight and avoid adding margin. Your concentration in tech makes you the most exposed trader in the room if sentiment shifts.

headline: SpaceX development could spike volatility
detail: An imminent SpaceX catalyst is flagged as a volatility trigger — directly relevant to your SPCX and SPAL positions. SPAL is a 2x leveraged ETF that decays and can move violently on news; a negative development could blow through stops fast on margin.
